title: worktree_pruned event payload
$comment: Class: OPTIONAL_SPEC_ID. Records the half-state REPAIR event 'a stale registry entry was removed for a worktree with no live git/canonical backing.' Distinct from worktree_destroyed, which records that a LIVE git worktree was removed (required branch/path). Emitted by caws worktree prune/repair for the unambiguous ghost-registry class (H1) authorized by WORKTREE-SPEC-AUTHORITY-CONTROL-PLANE-002. WORKTREE-REPAIR-EVENT-CONTRACT-001.

worktree_name.description: Name of the pruned worktree (the stale key removed from worktrees.json).

h_class.description: The §1.4 authorized half-state class this prune repaired. Only ghost_registry (H1) is repairable by prune; the enum is closed so a future class cannot be silently pruned without a doctrine update.

reason.description: Human-readable authority reason, e.g. 'no backing git worktree and canonical dir absent (H1 ghost)'.

spec_id.description: Optional: the spec id the ghost registry entry claimed, when present. A legitimate ghost may lack one.
